# Register map — spin_controller

Optically-levitated microsphere spin monitor + controller. 42 registers, dual-axis (A/B) PID + lock acquisition, capture, dual freq counters, streaming buffer, and multi-board trigger sync. Migrated from the hand-written axi_lite_slave.v.


- Base address: `0x40000000`
- Data width: 32 bits
- Address span: `0x100` bytes (8 address bits)
- Registers: 42

| Offset | Name | Access | Reset | Fields | Description |
|--------|------|--------|-------|--------|-------------|
| `0x00` | `control` | rw | `0x1` | [0] blink_enable; [1] dac_enable; [2] nco_phase_reset; [3] pid_enable; [4] lock_enable; [5] pid_enable_b; [6] lock_enable_b | axis-A: bit0 blink_enable, bit1 dac_enable, bit2 nco_phase_reset, bit3 pid_enable, bit4 lock_enable. axis-B: bit5 pid_enable_B, bit6 lock_enable_B. |
| `0x04` | `blink_half_period` | rw | `0x0` |  | LED blink half-period in clk cycles (0 -> default 62.5M = 1 Hz). |
| `0x08` | `scratch` | rw | `0x0` |  | Software round-trip test register. |
| `0x0c` | `magic` | ro (const) | `0xdeadbeef` |  | Bridge sanity constant. |
| `0x10` | `nco_tuning_word` | rw | `0x0` |  | f_DAC = tuning_word * 125 MHz / 2^32. |
| `0x14` | `nco_amplitude` | rw | `0x3fff` |  | 14-bit unsigned, full-scale at 0x3FFF. |
| `0x18` | `capture_ctrl` | rw | `0x0` | [0] trigger | bit 0 = trigger an 8K-sample raw ADC capture. |
| `0x1c` | `capture_status` | ro (in) | `0x0` | [0] capture_done; [31:16] depth | bit 0 capture_done, bits [31:16] = depth (8192). |
| `0x20` | `freq_gate_cycles` | rw | `0x0` |  | freq counter gate window in clk cycles (0 -> default 125_000 = 1 ms). |
| `0x24` | `freq_count_raw` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Latched zero-crossing count, raw-ADC path. |
| `0x28` | `freq_threshold` | rw | `0x32` |  | Schmitt hysteresis half-band (16-bit signed, default 50). |
| `0x2c` | `freq_count_dec` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Latched zero-crossing count, CIC+FIR path. |
| `0x30` | `amp_raw` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Peak |sample| over gate, raw-ADC path. |
| `0x34` | `amp_dec` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Peak |sample| over gate, CIC+FIR path. |
| `0x38` | `buffer_enable` | rw | `0x0` | [0] enable | bit 0 = stream records into the circular buffer each gate. |
| `0x3c` | `buffer_write_ptr` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Next slot the FPGA will write (0..depth-1). |
| `0x40` | `buffer_sample_count` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Monotonic total writes since enable. |
| `0x44` | `buffer_depth` | ro (const) | `0x400` |  | Buffer depth in records (constant from PL param, 1024). |
| `0x48` | `pid_setpoint` | rw | `0x0` |  | PID setpoint in freq-counter counts (signed). |
| `0x4c` | `pid_gains` | rw | `0x0` | [31:16] kp; [15:0] ki | [31:16] = kp, [15:0] = ki (both Q4.12 signed). |
| `0x50` | `nco_shift` | rw | `0x0` |  | Left-shift applied to PID output before adding to base_tw. |
| `0x54` | `pid_output` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Latest PID controller output (signed). |
| `0x58` | `pid_status` | ro (in) | `0x0` | [0] saturated_high; [1] saturated_low | bit 0 saturated_high, bit 1 saturated_low. |
| `0x5c` | `lock_status` | ro (in) | `0x0` | [0] locked | bit 0 = locked (state machine output). |
| `0x60` | `lock_target_tw` | rw | `0x0` |  | NCO tuning word the ramp aims at. |
| `0x64` | `lock_ramp_rate` | rw | `0x0` |  | tuning-word units per gate pulse during ramp. |
| `0x68` | `lock_capture_win` | rw | `0x0` |  | freq-counter error threshold (counts) to declare lock early. |
| `0x6c` | `sync_control` | rw | `0x0` | [0] sync_master_enable; [1] sync_slave_enable; [2] sync_retransmit_enable | multi-board trigger sync (Path A). Default 0 is invisible. |
| `0x70` | `adc_select` | rw | `0x0` | [0] raw_adc_select; [1] dec_adc_select | ADC channel selector for the on-PL freq counters. |
| `0x74` | `nco_tuning_word_b` | rw | `0x0` |  | axis-B NCO phase increment. |
| `0x78` | `nco_amplitude_b` | rw | `0x3fff` |  | axis-B NCO amplitude (14-bit unsigned). |
| `0x7c` | `freq_count_dec_b` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | axis-B decimated zero-crossing count. |
| `0x80` | `amp_dec_b` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | axis-B decimated peak amplitude. |
| `0x84` | `pid_setpoint_b` | rw | `0x0` |  | axis-B PID setpoint (counts). |
| `0x88` | `pid_gains_b` | rw | `0x0` | [31:16] kp; [15:0] ki | axis-B [31:16] = kp_B, [15:0] = ki_B (Q4.12 signed). |
| `0x8c` | `nco_shift_b` | rw | `0x0` |  | axis-B PID-out left-shift before nco_summer. |
| `0x90` | `pid_output_b` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | axis-B PID's latest control output. |
| `0x94` | `pid_status_b` | ro (in) | `0x0` | [0] saturated_high; [1] saturated_low | bit 0 saturated_high_B, bit 1 saturated_low_B. |
| `0x98` | `lock_status_b` | ro (in) | `0x0` | [0] locked | bit 0 = locked_B. |
| `0x9c` | `lock_target_tw_b` | rw | `0x0` |  | axis-B lock-acquisition ramp target. |
| `0xa0` | `lock_ramp_rate_b` | rw | `0x0` |  | axis-B lock ramp rate per gate. |
| `0xa4` | `lock_capture_win_b` | rw | `0x0` |  | axis-B lock capture window. |
